title: HungerGames
description: Lightweight HungerGames plugin that supports Multiple Arenas, Kits & Teams.
body:
# HungerGames Is Back!!!
I took a good 4 years off this plugin, but it's back with a fancy new inside.   
Major parts of this plugin were re-written to give a better game experience.

![Game Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f81db4ceb51c20b5663247ec0318561241eaebf.png)

**HungerGames** is a simple yet fun, and very lightweight PvP arena system.  
It provides advanced kits, spawns, and a very simple arena setup.   
If you've never heard of the books/movies HungerGames, it's basically a free for all.   
You must hunt for food and items, and attempt to kill others before they kill you. The last man standing wins!  
Unlike some HungerGames plugins, this one does not require you to setup a whole server for the game.    
You can just easily setup multiple arenas anywhere in the world.

## VERSION NOTES:
- HungerGames will try to always support the latest 3 Minecraft drops
- Check the version tab to find the appropriate HungerGames version for you Minecraft version

## FEATURES:
- Create multiple arenas for your players to play in
- Lobby signs that your players can click to enter arenas, and they auto-update ith status
- Editable arenas (with custom timers, min/max players, cost, etc)
- Very lightweight (not performance heavy at all)
- Arenas don't require their own world, you can have as many in each world as you want
- Vault economy support (cost to player games, winner gets a payout)
- Super simple arena setup (One command, couple clicks... and you're done)
- Random items will generate in arena chests
- Bonus chests will generate even more items
- Chest drops will generate even MORE items
- Global and per-Arena Loot Tables allow for even more customization
- Spectating Feature allowing players to watch the game close up
- Smart mob spawning engine with customizable mobs (also supports MythicMobs)
- Highly configurable (configs for days... well not really, but theres lots of options)
- Customizable kits
- Per-Arena Kits allows for even MORE customization
- Customizable messages (a language file for nearly every single message in the plugin)
- Player teams (Players can work together to fight other players)
- Full rollback system (don't need to worry about players destroying your arenas)
- Leaderboard placeholders via PlaceholderAPI
- World border system, pushes players towards the center of the arena when time is running out

## COMMANDS & PERMISSIONS:
[**See Wiki**](https://github.com/ShaneBeeStudios/HungerGames/wiki)

## ARENA SETUP:
[**See Wiki**](https://github.com/ShaneBeeStudios/HungerGames/wiki)
NOTE: An arena's lobby signs WILL NOT WORK in vanilla spawn protection, make sure to either put your lobby signs outside of vanilla spawn protection, disable vanilla spawn protection or move vanilla spawn protection.

## LEADERBOARDS / PLACEHOLDERS:
- HungerGames stores wins in a leaderboard file, this data can be accessed via (PlaceholderAPI) placeholders and used in other plugins such as scoreboard or hologram plugins.
